name: camp_entrance
_comment: User 2026-05-31 (#1): PP was standing on air. Walkable foot band ~x8..x1354 at foot y≈672-791 (walk line ~728). minY/maxY clamp PP's top-left so his foot (top+270) stays in that band: minY=672-270=402, maxY=791-270=521. spawnY=458 → foot ~728.
_comment_walk: User 2026-06-12 (4th walk-line report): retro PTP keeps every character ON one ground line. v1 segments: a main line across the clearing in front of the fence/gate (center y=600, foot ~735) + a spur up the dirt path to the gate opening. Estimated from the BG - walk it with F3 and tune the endpoints.
